serviceDescription: Amazon Chime lets you meet, chat, and collaborate with the security of AWS. You can work seamlessly on your devices, and meet from your desk or on the go - ensuring you always stay connected.

templates.title: Amazon Chime
templates.description: Quick estimate: Use the quick estimate for a fast route to a rough estimate.

cards.title: Chime SDK
cards.helpText: The Amazon Chime SDK is a set of real-time communications components that developers can use to quickly add audio, video, and screen sharing capabilities to their own web or mobile applications.
cards.bodyText: The Amazon Chime SDK is a set of real-time communications components that developers can use to quickly add audio, video, and screen sharing capabilities to their own web or mobile applications.

components.label: Number of attendees
components.placeholder: Enter number of attendees

components.placeholder: Enter duration

components.label: Number of sessions per month
components.placeholder: Enter number of sessions per month

cards.title: Chime Messaging
cards.helpText: Messaging is pay-per-use with rates for sending messages, message delivery, and message storage. The Amazon Chime SDK only charges you for what you use, allowing you to scale as needed.
cards.bodyText: Messaging is pay-per-use with rates for sending messages, message delivery, and message storage. The Amazon Chime SDK only charges you for what you use, allowing you to scale as needed.

components.text: This calculation assumes stored resources are present throughout the entire month. As new messages and messaging resources are added, storage cost will increase. To keep message storage costs down, you can implement a retention policy and delete unused resources.

components.label: Number of persisted standard messages sent per month
components.placeholder: Enter number of persisted standard messages sent per month
components.description: Persisted messages add 4kb to your storage cost

components.label: Number of non-persisted standard messages sent per month
components.placeholder: Enter number of non-persisted standard messages sent per month
components.description: These messages do not add to your storage cost

components.label: Number of persisted control messages sent per month
components.placeholder: Enter number of persisted control messages sent per month
components.description: Persisted control messages add 30 bytes to your total storage cost

components.label: Number of non-persisted control messages sent per month
components.placeholder: Enter number of non-persisted control messages sent per month
components.description: These messages do not add to your storage cost

components.label: Number of system messages sent per month
components.placeholder: Enter number of system messages sent per month
components.description: System messages are sent when channels are created or deleted, and when users are added or removed from channels

components.label: Number of messages deliveries over active connection per month
components.placeholder: Enter number of messages deliveries over active connection per month
components.description: Messages delivered immediately on send to channel members connected through an active websocket

components.label: Number of calls to List Channel Messages per month
components.placeholder: Enter number of calls to list Channel Messages per month
components.description: The number of times List Channel Messages will be called to load messages in a channel

components.label: Additional stored resources
components.placeholder: Enter number of additional storage resources
components.description: Total number of app instances, channels, channel memberships, channel moderators, read timestamps, and user bans. Each adds 1kb to storage cost

cards.title: Toll Public Switched Telephone Network (PSTN) Audio
cards.helpText: The Amazon Chime SDK allows you to add phone numbers for your meetings so that attendees can participate using a landline or mobile phone. For dial in, the service currently supports DID and toll-free phone numbers in the United States. For dial out, the service supports calling to over 115 countries. To use PSTN audio, builders create a serverless IVR application using AWS Lambda.
cards.bodyText: The Amazon Chime SDK allows you to add phone numbers for your meetings so that attendees can participate using a landline or mobile phone. For dial in, the service currently supports DID and toll-free phone numbers in the United States. For dial out, the service supports calling to over 115 countries. To use PSTN audio, builders create a serverless IVR application using AWS Lambda.
